Core fitting function for BRIER.I

BRIERi.eta.Rd

Internal function that fits a penalized regression model for a single eta combination vector. Called by BRIERi, BRIERfull, and BRIERi.cv. Performs response/predictor validation, standardization, lambda path setup, and dispatches to the appropriate coordinate-descent C++ routine.

Usage

BRIERi.eta(
  X,
  y,
  weights = NULL,
  eta = 0,
  y.external = NULL,
  family = c("gaussian", "binomial", "poisson"),
  penalty.factor = rep(1, ncol(X)),
  penalty = c("LASSO", "SCAD", "MCP"),
  alpha = 1,
  gamma = ifelse(penalty == "SCAD", 3.7, 3),
  lambda,
  nlambda = 100,
  lambda.min = {
     if (nrow(X) > ncol(X)) 
         1e-04
     else 0.05
 },
  log.lambda = TRUE,
  max.iter = 1e+06,
  eps = 1e-04,
  nvar.max = NULL,
  returnX = FALSE
)

Arguments

X

A numeric matrix of predictors (n x p).

y

A numeric response vector of length n.

weights

Optional numeric vector of observation weights (length n). Defaults to equal weights.

eta

A numeric vector of external-model weights (length M). Use eta = 0 to ignore external information.

y.external

Optional numeric matrix of external predictions (n x M).

family

A string: "gaussian", "binomial", or "poisson".

penalty.factor

A numeric vector of per-variable penalty multipliers (length p). Variables with multiplier 0 are unpenalised.

penalty

A string specifying the penalty: "LASSO", "MCP", or "SCAD".

alpha

A numeric scalar for the elastic net mixing parameter.

gamma

A numeric scalar for MCP and SCAD penalties.

lambda

Optional user-specified lambda sequence.

nlambda

An integer specifying the number of lambda values.

lambda.min

A numeric scalar for the minimum lambda ratio.

log.lambda

Logical. If TRUE, the lambda sequence is log-spaced.

max.iter

An integer specifying the maximum total iterations.

eps

A numeric scalar for the convergence tolerance.

nvar.max

An integer specifying the maximum number of selected variables.

returnX

Logical. If TRUE, the standardised data list is returned in the output for diagnostics.

Value

An object of class "BRIER.eta" containing model specification, coefficients, fit statistics, and data.

See also

BRIERi, BRIERfull, coef.BRIER.eta, predict.BRIER.eta

On this page
